name: 90"x20" Table Runner Dark Blue Woven - Threshold™
description:
Give your dining table an understated, casual look with this Woven Table Runner from Threshold™. The rectangular table runner features a woven stripe pattern in blue hue that's complemented by fringed edges, adding a sophisticated touch you'll love. The 100% cotton table runner helps protect your surface against scratches, spills and messes. Pair with coordinating napkins and placemats to create an elegant dining setup.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
